summary: Iteration 31 Testing Complete - All features working: Document expiration alerts, 4-column card grids (clients, booking vehicles), document upload with expiry_date, expiry status badges, and booking confirmation redirect with highlight banner.

GET /api/admin/vehicles/document-alerts?.details: Returns alerts with vehicle_id, vehicle_name, plate_number, doc_id, doc_type, doc_type_label, expiry_date, severity (warning/expired). Sorted by severity then expiry_date.

POST /api/admin/vehicles/{id}/documents.details: expiry_date query param properly saved to document record. Null when not provided.

Clients page 4-column card grid.details: FlatList with numColumns={4}. Cards show avatar, name, email, phone, reservation count badge, rating badge overlay.

Booking step 3 vehicle selection 4-colum.details: Shows vehicle cards with photo placeholder, 'Dispo'/'Occupe' badges, vehicle specs, price/day, and total price when selected.

Vehicle edit modal expiry date input.details: Input field with placeholder 'AAAA-MM-JJ' and data-testid='doc-expiry-date' present in Documents section.

Document list expiry status badges.details: Documents show green checkmark (OK), orange warning with days remaining (e.g., '▲ 15j'), or red expired badge.

Dashboard document expiry alerts section.details: Shows 'Alertes documents (N)' with cards showing vehicle name, plate, doc type, expiry date, and 'Bientot'/'Expire' badges.

Booking confirmation redirect with highl.details: After booking, redirects to /agency-app/reservations?highlight={resId}&month=YYYY-MM. Shows green 'Reservation creee avec succes !' banner with pulse animation.

test_classes: TestDocumentAlertsEndpoint - 4 tests (default 30 days, custom days, sorting, auth required)

critical_code_review_comments: Document alerts endpoint properly filters by agency_id and excludes deleted documents
Expiry status calculation correctly identifies expired (past) vs warning (within N days)
4-column grids implemented with FlatList numColumns={4} with proper gap calculations
Highlight mechanism uses URL params and Animated.loop for pulse effect with 4-second auto-clear
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test document with expiry_date=2026-03-17 on vehicle 4bd9f2fa
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document expiration system fully implemented. Dashboard shows alerts, vehicle edit modal shows expiry badges (green/orange/red). Clients and booking vehicle selection use 4-column card grids. Booking confirmation redirects to planning page with highlight animation.
